hero.badge: 100% Pure Veg Hotel. Delivered in 30 min.
hero.description: Welcome to SAM — Chennai's premium 100% pure vegetarian hotel kitchen. From crispy golden dosas to rich North Indian curries and hand-crafted event catering, we deliver the moment you call.
